_note: No producer-computed values. Every field is a structural shape, named enum constant, or boundary condition. AC bindings are from feature-plans/ai-advisor.md AC-4.1..AC-4.3 + AC-X*. The explain-only boundary is the load-bearing M5 contract: chat has no write path, no path to accept/apply/mutation routes, issues no trade directives, proposes/applies no config/logic/asset changes.

chat_explain_only_boundary._note: AC-4.1 MANDATORY — the load-bearing M5 check. Chat is read-only; any implementation that could mutate/apply/trade must FAIL these tests.
chat_must_not: call a Composer write endpoint (POST/PUT /symphonies, /copy, /deploy, go-to-cash)
place a trade or issue a trade directive
propose or apply a config change (write to symphony_strategies or bot_state)
propose or apply a logic change
propose or apply an asset swap
call the /ai-advisor/accept route or any accept/apply mutation route
call the /ai-advisor/reject route in a state-changing way beyond dismissal
return a response that could be mistaken for a trade instruction
chat_must: return only explanatory text about the anchored artifact
ground its answer in the surfaced artifact data (observations, gate verdicts, diagnostic figures)
be anchored to a specific artifact (recommendation, diagnostic figure, or gate verdict)
degrade gracefully when no LLM key is configured (clear unavailable message, no crash)
never fabricate a trade instruction even when the LLM is unavailable
chat_explain_only_boundary.allowed_write: none — chat produces only LLM-generated explanatory text; zero DB writes, zero Composer calls
chat_explain_only_boundary.forbidden_write_path: any route that touches symphony_strategies, bot_state, or Composer write endpoints

artifact_anchor_contract._note: AC-4.2 + Gate-1 Resolution #3. Chat is contextual: anchored to ONE specific surfaced artifact, not a free-floating global chatbot.
artifact_anchor_contract.new_recommendation_means: any suggestion of a trade, config change, asset swap, or logic tweak not already present in the anchored artifact

llm_mock_contract._note: The LLM call MUST be mockable; no live Anthropic calls in the default test suite.

mock_return_shape.text: a non-empty string containing explanatory text about the artifact

chat_unavailable_contract._note: AC-4.3. No LLM key / LLM error -> clear 'chat unavailable' message, never a crash, never a fabricated trade instruction.

llm_api_error_behavior.error_message_format: non-empty string the UI can display

route_guard_contract._note: AC-4.1 route-guard: chat routes are read-only (or a constrained POST that only returns explanatory text, never mutates). Import-graph + route check.
route_guard_contract.chat_route_post_constraint: returns only explanatory text JSON — no DB writes, no Composer calls, no mutation

live_path_guard._note: AC-X2: chat_engine must not appear on the 1-minute live execution path.

response_shape_contract._note: Shape assertions only — no hardcoded LLM-produced text values.

advisory_only_persistence_contract._note: Chat does NOT write advisor_observations. It is purely a Q&A surface. No DB writes of any kind.
